name: Nimble
description: When a unit with the Nimble keyword defends against an attack and spends at least 1 Dodge token during any point of the attack sequence, after the attack is resolved, it gains 1 Dodge token.
official_rules_text: When a unit with the Nimble keyword defends against an attack and spends at least 1 Dodge token during any point of the attack sequence, after the attack is resolved, it gains 1 Dodge token.
